articles.title: 15 Indian tourists were killed after a speedboat capsized in southern Vietnam - AP News
articles.description: A tourist boat has capsized in southern Vietnam, killing 15 Indian visitors. The speedboat was carrying 32 Indian tourists and four crew members when it overturned Saturday near Hon May Rut Ngoai Island. Witnesses told VN Express that nearby boats rushed to t…
articles.content:
HANOI, Vietnam (AP) A tourist boat returning from an island trip in southern Vietnam capsized on Saturday, killing 15 Indian visitors, state media reported.
